title:
Meet the visionary behind our iconic global brands, Lynda Resnick. She is co-founder and co-owner of The Wonderful Company, known for Wonderful Pistachios, POM Wonderful, Wonderful Halos, and much more! Lynda recently sat down with Harley Finkelstein and David Segal on the Big Shot, a podcast interviewing entrepreneurs who have created successful businesses.
 
From her early years in Pennsylvania to building well-known brands and thriving communities around the world, this conversation offers a compelling look at her legacy and the principles that have guided her life and philanthropy.

title: Who Owns The Wonderful Company Company? - Porter's Five Forces
excerpts:
Section Title: Who Owns The Wonderful Company Company? > Who truly controls The Wonderful Company?
Content:
When The Wonderful Company unified its pistachio, pomegranate, and floral businesses, it became a dominant private agri-consumer group. Founded as Paramount Farming in 1979, the firm built a vertically integrated model owning orchards, processing, and brands. Today it combines scale in crops, beverages, wine, and floral services under concentrated family ownership.
The company is majority-owned and controlled by founders Stewart and Lynda Resnick, who oversee operations across more than **125,000 acres** and consumer brands such as FIJI Water and POM Wonderful. See The Wonderful Company Porter's Five Forces Analysis for strategic context.

title: Claims about who owns California's water are spreading online. Here's what to know. - CBS News
excerpts:
Section Title: ... > Who are the Resnicks?
Content:
Stewart and Lynda Resnick own the Wonderful Company. Founded in 1979, their portfolio includes Wonderful Pistachios, POM pomegranate juice, Halo tangerines — agricultural businesses that all require water — and Fiji Water. The company claims to be one of the largest food producers in the world and grows a significant portion of its produce in California.
However, it is the Resnicks' large stake in the [Kern Water Bank](https://www.kwb.org/faqs) — a 32-square-mile underground reservoir 150 miles from Los Angeles — that has garnered negative attention in recent weeks.

**Lynda Rae Resnick** (née Harris) is an American entrepreneur born in 1943. She is vice-chairman of The Wonderful Company .

title: Working at The Wonderful Company | Great Place To Work®
excerpts:
Section Title: The Wonderful Company > Company Overview > About The Company
Content:
The Wonderful Company, co-founded and co-led by Lynda and Stewart Resnick, is a $6 billion enterprise that grows, bottles, packages, and markets iconic global brands, including FIJI Water, POM Wonderful, Wonderful Pistachios, Wonderful Citrus, JUSTIN, Lewis Cellars, and Landmark wines. Wonderful has a long-standing commitment to the communities where employees live and work, especially in California’s Central Valley, home to 3,000 of its 10,000-person workforce. The Resnicks, along with their foundations and Wonderful, have invested more than $2.5 billion in education, health and wellness, community development, and sustainability initiatives across the Central Valley, Fiji, and the world.
COMPANY SIZE
5,836 U.S.-based Employees
(Large)
Industry
Manufacturing & Production
